entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: Cicer arietinum L., the crop studied for cold stress injury during the pod-filling phase

entities.name: CHILLING STRESS
entities.description: Low temperature conditions below 10 degrees Celsius that are detrimental to chickpea

entities.name: REPRODUCTIVE PHASE
entities.description: The stage of plant development involving flowering and seed production

entities.name: POD-FILLING STAGE
entities.description: The phase of seed development where pods are filled with seeds

entities.name: EARLY POD-FILLING
entities.description: The initial stage of the pod-filling phase

entities.name: LATE POD-FILLING
entities.description: The final stage of the pod-filling phase

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The total amount of seed produced, which is severely reduced by chilling stress

entities.name: ELECTROLYTE LEAKAGE
entities.description: A measure of cell membrane damage used to assess stress injury, which increases under cold stress

entities.name: TTC REDUCTION
entities.description: 2,3,5-triphenyl tetrazolium chloride reduction used to analyze stress injury

entities.name: RELATIVE LEAF WATER CONTENT
entities.description: The amount of water in the leaf relative to its full turgidity, reduced by cold stress

entities.name: TOTAL CHLOROPHYLL CONTENT
entities.description: The total amount of chlorophyll present in the leaves, reduced by cold stress

entities.name: SUCROSE CONTENT
entities.description: The concentration of sucrose in the leaves, which decreases significantly under cold stress

entities.name: TOTAL PLANT DRY WEIGHT
entities.description: The mass of the plant after water removal, showing small differences between stress stages

entities.name: SEED GROWTH RATE
entities.description: The speed at which seeds increase in size and mass, greatly decreased by late pod-filling stress

entities.name: SEED FILL DURATION
entities.description: The length of time taken for seeds to reach maturity, greatly decreased by late pod-filling stress

entities.name: SEED NUMBER
entities.description: The total count of seeds produced, greatly decreased by late pod-filling stress

entities.name: AVERAGE SEED WEIGHT
entities.description: The mean mass of individual seeds, greatly decreased by late pod-filling stress

entities.name: SEED SIZE
entities.description: The physical dimensions of the seeds, greatly decreased by late pod-filling stress

entities.name: STARCH
entities.description: A carbohydrate storage component in seeds, showing greater reduction under late pod-filling stress

entities.name: PROTEINS
entities.description: Nitrogenous organic compounds in seeds, showing greater reduction under late pod-filling stress

entities.name: SOLUBLE SUGARS
entities.description: Water-soluble carbohydrates in seeds, showing greater reduction under late pod-filling stress

entities.name: FAT
entities.description: Lipid content in seeds, showing greater reduction under late pod-filling stress

entities.name: CRUDE FIBRE
entities.description: Indigestible carbohydrate components in seeds, showing greater reduction under late pod-filling stress

entities.name: STORAGE PROTEIN FRACTIONS
entities.description: Specific types of proteins stored in seeds, showing greater reduction under late pod-filling stress

entities.name: SUCROSE SYNTHASE
entities.description: An enzyme involved in sucrose metabolism, with activity decreased during late pod-filling stress

entities.name: INVERTASE
entities.description: An enzyme that catalyzes the hydrolysis of sucrose, with activity decreased during late pod-filling stress

entities.name: STARCH SYNTHASE
entities.description: An enzyme involved in the synthesis of starch, with activity decreased during late pod-filling stress

entities.name: GERMINATION
entities.description: The process of seed sprouting, inhibited more by early pod-filling stress

entities.name: GROWTH POTENTIAL
entities.description: The capacity of a seed to grow into a seedling, inhibited more by early pod-filling stress

entities.name: GLASSHOUSE
entities.description: Controlled environment where chickpea plants were grown under warm conditions

entities.name: FIELD
entities.description: Environment where chickpea plants were subjected to cold conditions

relationships.description: shows greater reduction in activity under stress
shows greater reduction in activity under stress
shows greater reduction in activity under stress
